title: Dynamic(true) as identity element
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.optional_filter/1` that takes a map with an optional `:team_id`. If present, filter users by `team_id`; if absent, return all users. Start the dynamic with `dynamic(true)` as the identity element. Use `Enum.reduce/3`. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: The canonical reduce-starts-from-dynamic(true) pattern. One clause, but introduces the idiom.
research_citation: Jonny Eberhardt: 'dynamic(true) serves as the initial condition, allowing seamless composition'
